items.name: Personalized Animator Backpack
items.description: Are you tired because your animations have become a little worse? You need the perfect assistant for all occasions? Then this backpack is especially for you! In it you will find all the right gadgets for the animation business, as well as a personal mini - assistant Lindsey, that is always ready to help and moral support for the creation of even the most difficult projects! Go ahead and shine incredible peaks together!

items.name: 🎀「Marshmallow Duffle Coat [PBR]」
items.description:
A sweet pastel duffle coat that feels as soft as a marshmallow.
Its rosy pink hue and classic toggle buttons bring a playful charm to winter outfits, while the hood keeps you warm and ready for chilly adventures.
✨ Features
Fluffy pink coat with toggle closures
Cute and cozy pastel winter style
Great for casual, kawaii, or cozy looks
PBR textures for soft fabric realism
🔍 Keywords: pastel coat, duffle coat, cute, cozy, kawaii, winter
